opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I spilled boiling water from the kettle on my arm, and the skin feels like it's continuously on fire.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I scalded my forearm 45 minutes ago and it's very painful — I want to know how bad it is.

symptom_narrative.onset: 45 minutes ago, boiling water spill on the inner forearm
symptom_narrative.character: burning pain, red dry skin, no blisters
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: red, warm, mildly swollen; no blisters; ran it under cool water for 15 minutes

objective_data_offered.value: uniform red, dry patch ~10x8cm on inner forearm, no blisters, blanches on pressure, visible on video
cooled under running tap water for 15 minutes
